description.intro: Converting cargo space into a carrier-based aircraft maintenance area. This makeshift modification significantly affects refit efficiency, increasing refit time by %s.

combat.collision_immunity: Phase shift armor immune to collision

description.title: GN force field defense system
description.main: This protective stance formed by the GN particles produced by the solar furnace provides shield protection independent of amplitude energy, with a shield capacity of %s of maximum amplitude energy, a recovery rate of %s of amplitude energy dissipation, and a shield armor value of %s of maximum amplitude energy (capped at %s points).
description.restart: After the shield is broken, it requires a restart delay and charging to %s before it can be reactivated.
description.emp_immunity: Immune to %s damage while the shield is active.
description.detail_text: The GN force field defense system is a shield defense system that is independent of amplitude energy and will automatically recover after being damaged. After the shield is broken, it requires a restart delay and then charges to %s before it can be reactivated.
description.detail_hint: Press and hold %s to view detailed instructions
description.table_explain_cap: Shield Capacity: The maximum damage the shield can withstand
description.table_explain_regen: Recovery speed: shield value recovered per second
description.table_explain_cooldown: Recovery cooldown: How long does it take to start recovering after receiving damage?
description.table_explain_armor: Shield Armor: Reduces damage from high-penetrating weapons
description.table_explain_restart: Restart delay: the waiting time after the shield is broken

description.intro: Vector Industries' ships often reserve weapon slots that far exceed conventional ones, but their reactor size and energy supply network cannot fully support the simultaneous operation of these weapons. Therefore, this type of ship often does not fill all the weapon slots in actual combat, but redistributes the energy supply margin of unused slots to the flux and protection systems.
